title: Silverline General Purpose Screwdriver Set 6pce (546524), Blue & Grey
features: Includes flared slotted 3 x 75mm, 5 x 100mm & 6 x 100mm
Pozidriv PZ0 x 75mm, PZ1 x 100mm & PZ2 x 100mm
description: From the manufacturer Silverline 546524 General Purpose Screwdriver Set 6-Piece Manufacturer's Description A toolbox essential, the Silverline General Purpose Screwdriver Set consists of a selection of types and sizes of screwdrivers for every application in general DIY and building work. Hardened and tempered chrome vanadium steel shanks with chemically blackened tips enable great grip and make them resistant to corrosion. The ultra-comfortable, high-grip ergonomic handle provides excellent control during usage and torque transition, allowing you to insert and remove screws quickly, easily and efficiently. Colour-coded handles allow for easy recognition between tip-types avoiding confusion and mistakes when looking for the right type of screwdriver. Includes 3 x flared-slotted drivers (3 x 75 mm, 5 x 100 mm and 6 x 100 mm) and 3 Phillips (P01 x 75 mm, PH1 x 100 mm and PH2 x 100 mm). - Chrome vanadium blades - Hardened and blackened tips - Bi-coloured soft-grip handles - Includes flared slotted 3 x 75 mm, 5 x 100 mm and 6 x 100 mm - Pozidriv PZ0 x 75 mm, PZ1 x 100 mm and PZ2 x 100 mm Technical Specifications Blade hardness: HRC50-52 Finish: Satin chrome-plated blades Handle material: Polypropylene Material – tip: Cr-V, black phosphate Product dimensions (H x L x W): 315 x 145 x 30 mm Product weight: 0.37 kg Key Features Ideal for the quick and easy insertion and removal of screws
